item.title:
SmallerFishGAA: Smaller Fish @SmallerFishGAA · 51s Just the 1-03 for Charlie Mitchel tonight
He told me during the week he'd be lucky t
item.description:
Smaller Fish @SmallerFishGAA · 51s Just the 1-03 for Charlie Mitchel tonight
He told me during the week he'd be lucky to play a part at all in Leinster
That's up there with Liam Cahill 'i don't play sweepers' levels of cuteness 99
The GAA @officialgaa · 14min REPORT: @Carlow_GAA made a brilliant start to the Joe McDonagh Cup, defeating @CLGLaois at Netwatch Cullen Park #GAA De gaa.ie 1 1 mil
The GAA @officialgaa · 21min REPORT: @OfficialWexGAA overcame a spirited @KildareGAA outfit in the @gaaleinster SHC #GAA De gaa.ie 2 1 mil
